name: Chicken Nachos
recipeIngredient: 2 medium Idaho potatoes (about 1 pound), cut into 1/4-inch slices
1 (2 oz.) can sliced ripe olives, drained
recipeInstructions:
1. Arrange potato slices on a large microwave-safe platter; sprinkle with garlic powder.
2. Cover with plastic wrap. Microwave at High for 4 to 5 minutes or until potatoes are tender, rotating the dish once.
3. Combine chicken, picante sauce, and onions in a medium bowl; stir well.
4. Spoon 1 teaspoon of the mixture onto each potato slice. Sprinkle with cheese and top with an olive slice.
5. Cover and microwave at High for 1 minute or until cheese is melted.
6. Serve immediately.
Yield: 30 appetizers
Per serving: 30 calories, 2 grams protein, 3 grams carbohydrate, 1 gram fat (26%), 6 milligrams cholesterol, 50 milligrams sodium
